mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, email, phone FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT user_id, username, password, email, phone FROM sys_user

select distinct p.permission from sys_user u join user_role r on u.user_id = r.user_id join role_permission rp on rp.role_id = r.role_id join permission p on rp.perm_id = p.id where u.user_id = #{id};
SELECT user_id, username, password, phone FROM sys_user where phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password, email, phone ) values( #{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone} )
